sections.content:
<tool_call>

seg = current_frame.segmentation

    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  id={node['id']}, color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
